panels.description: Business success rate over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey") AS "series",
  avg("businessSuccess") * 100 AS "business_success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Business success by swarm/call/businessCode

panels.description: Processor status class distribution over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat(
    "swarmId",
    ' | ',
    "callIdKey",
    ' | ',
    "businessCodeKey",
    ' | ',
    "processorStatusClass"
  ) AS "series",
  count(*) AS "txns"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey", "processorStatusClass"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Processor status classes over time

panels.description: Processor success rate over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey") AS "series",
  avg("processorSuccess") * 100 AS "processor_success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Processor success by swarm/call/businessCode

panels.description: Worst quality groups in the selected range, grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  "swarmId",
  "callIdKey" AS "callId",
  "businessCodeKey" AS "businessCode",
  count(*) AS "txns",
  (1 - avg("businessSuccess")) * 100 AS "business_fail_pct",
  (1 - avg("processorSuccess")) * 100 AS "processor_fail_pct",
  approx_percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "p95_rtt_ms",
  max("processorDurationMs") AS "max_rtt_ms"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
HAVING count(*) >= 20
ORDER BY "business_fail_pct" DESC, "txns" DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Worst groups by swarm/call/businessCode

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 500
list.label: Call ID
list.name: callId
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 500
list.label: Business Code
list.name: businessCode
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 500
